summary: The user attended a literary festival in downtown Chicago, where they enjoyed back-to-back book readings by authors Celeste Ng and Gabrielle Zevin. They sought book recommendations similar to Ng's style and expressed interest in Liane Moriarty's works, particularly "Big Little Lies," as well as Taylor Jenkins Reid's "The Seven Husbands of Evelyn Hugo" and its sequel, "The Heir Affair."
